summary: Schema evolution: adds source_type to channels, refactors sync_state from last_msg_id to checkpoint TEXT
alterations: ALTER TABLE channels ADD COLUMN source_type TEXT DEFAULT 'telegram'
sync_state table redesign: last_msg_id INTEGER -> checkpoint TEXT
migration_pattern: CREATE new table (sync_state_new with updated schema)
INSERT data with type conversion (CAST last_msg_id to TEXT)
DROP old table and RENAME new
notes: Second migration showing schema evolution. Adds multi-source support via source_type column. Refactors sync tracking from integer message IDs to arbitrary text checkpoints, enabling support for non-sequential source systems. Uses safe table recreation pattern to handle NOT NULL constraint on new checkpoint column.
